Price Drop Tracker — Settings

1. RapidAPI Key

This extension uses the Real-Time Amazon Data API on RapidAPI . Steps to get a key:

  1. Create a free account at rapidapi.com.
  2. Open the "Real-Time Amazon Data" API page (link above) and click Subscribe (a free tier is available).
  3. Copy your X-RapidAPI-Key from the "Header Parameters" section of the API's code snippets.
  4. Paste it below.

2. Check Frequency

Free RapidAPI tiers have limited monthly requests. Choose an interval that fits your quota and how many products you track.

Saved ✓
